title: Vanilla+ 3D Ladder
description: Lightweight 3D ladders that enhance visuals while staying true to vanilla style.
body:
##  Vanilla+ 3D Ladders

**Lightweight 3D ladders that enhance visuals while staying true to vanilla style.**

---
![items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04a857f0233dd61b0a1c43a7ec91ad1634c6b157.png)
### ✨ Features

> • Subtle and clean 3D ladder models
> • Vanilla+ style — blends perfectly with default textures
> • Lightweight — no FPS drops
> • No unnecessary changes, only ladders improved
> • Compatible with most resource packs

---

### ⚙️ Compatibility

> ✔ Minecraft **1.19 → 21.1+**
> ✔ Works with **Fabric / OptiFine / Vanilla**
> ✔ Supports most texture packs

---

### 📦 Installation

> 1. Download the resource pack
> 2. Move it to `.minecraft/resourcepacks`
> 3. Enable it in-game
> 4. Done ✔

---

### ⚠️ Notes

> • Only ladder models are modified
> • Place this pack above others for best results
> • No shaders or extra mods required

---

### ❤️ Credits

> Created by **GAMER_TIGE99**

---

### 🏷️ Tags

`3D` `Vanilla+` `Lightweight` `Utility` `Decoration`
